VORFALE_TWEAKS.linklame-macos-keybind.hi: Changes conflicting macOS shortcuts for Quick Insert and Shadowrun Prompt Success Test on each macOS client. Requires Quick Insert.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.linklame-macos-keybind.de: Applies macOS-only keybinding overrides while leaving Windows, Linux, and custom user bindings untouched.
